name: io.github.italomenezes/pluggy-mcp
title: Pluggy MCP
description: MCP server for the Pluggy API — Brazilian Open Finance connectors, accounts, and (later) transactions, exposed to LLMs as strictly read-only tools.

environmentVariables.name: PLUGGY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Pluggy API client id, generated from the Pluggy dashboard.

environmentVariables.name: PLUGGY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Pluggy API client secret, generated from the Pluggy dashboard.
